_note: SILORA ORIENT — Product Catalog. To publish: set 'published': true → git push → live in 30s. To unpublish (out of stock): set 'published': false → push. To add image: put file in images/ → set 'image' field → set published: true → push.
_workflow: 1. Add image to images/  2. Fill in price  3. Set published: true  4. git push

series.title: Phalaenopsis — Seven Colourways
series.title_zh: 蝴蝶兰系列（耳钉·戒指·挂坠）
series.tagline: Seven colour stories named after a sensory memory. The flower alone is enough.
series.tagline_zh: 七款以感官体验命名的配色故事。花型本身已是最好的设计。
series.story:
The Phalaenopsis orchid was chosen for this series because of its naturally extraordinary form — a graceful, wing-like silhouette that speaks for itself. No extra leaves, no decorative tendrils, no beads. The flower alone is enough.

The entire design philosophy rests on colour. Each piece was created in a carefully considered palette and paired with complementary gemstone accents: shell pearls (贝壳珠) for soft luminous warmth; layered shell pearls (叠贝珠) for rich textured depth; crystals and semi-precious stones for brilliance.

Seven named colourways — each a distinct mood named after a sensory experience:
Honey Peach Oolong (蜜桃乌龙) · Into the Emerald Forest (绿野仙踪) · Sea Salt Mango Ice (海盐芒果冰) · Frozen Wonderland (冰雪奇缘) · Gilded Dreams (澛金旧梦) · Starry Moon Night (星月夜) · Taro Waves (芋泥啵啵)

Available as earrings (耳钉), rings (戒指), and pendants (挂坠). Clip-on (耳夹) versions also available.
series.story_zh:
蝴蝶兰拥有天然优雅、辨识度极高的花型，宛如翩翩蝴蝶展翅，本身就是最好的设计。因此，这个系列没有额外添加叶片或珠串，只保留最纯粹的一朵花。

整体设计重心落在色彩上，搭配不同珠宝：贝壳珠（柔和温润的光泽）、叠贝珠（有层次感的质地）、水晶与宝石（璀璨的色彩与光芒）。

共七款配色，每款以一种感官体验命名：
蜜桃乌龙 · 绿野仙踪 · 海盐芒果冰 · 冰雪奇缘 · 澛金旧梦 · 星月夜 · 芋泥啵啵

涵盖耳钉、戒指与挂坠，提供耳夹款式。
series.price: 耳钉 $79/pr · 耳挂 $60 · 戒指/挂坠 from $80
series.price_zh: 耳钉 $79一对 · 耳挂 $60一只 · 戒指/挂坠 $80起

series.series: 花的系列 · 却下水晶帘
series.title: Crystal Curtain
series.tagline: A Tang Dynasty poem rendered in silk, crystal, and gold. A still autumn night, a luminous moon.
series.tagline_zh: 李白诗意，以丝绸、水晶与金丝重现。静秋夜色，月光如帘。
series.story:
The title is drawn from a Tang Dynasty poem by Li Bai:

"She rolls back the crystal curtain,
And gazes through its jade-clear folds at the autumn moon."
— 却下水晶帘，玲珑望秋月

At the centre sits a large, translucent round disc — a moon rendered in semi-opaque white material, its surface carrying the faint luminosity of moonlight through cloud. Around it, small five-petal flowers in lavender and blue-white bloom along gold copper wire, their petals shading from soft purple at the edges to white at the centre — the cool, otherworldly palette of a night sky.

Gold wire curls outward freely like uncurling fern fronds, and a cascade of crystal-clear chain tassels (水晶流苏) hangs from the lower arc — catching light with every movement, evoking the shimmer of moonbeams passing through a crystal curtain.

Presented as a hairpin set (发簪) alongside a companion brooch, together recreating the full scene: a still autumn night, a luminous moon, and the poet's quiet longing.
series.story_zh:
作品名取自李白的诗句：「却下水晶帘，玲珑望秋月。」

中央是一枚大型半透明圆形月片，表面透出淡淡的月光质感；周围，薰衣草紫与蓝白色渐变的五瓣小花沿金色铜丝绽放，花瓣边缘深紫向花心渐白，是夜空独有的清冷色调。

金色铜丝自由向外延伸如蕨类舒展的弧线，下方垂落一串水晶透明链条流苏——随风摇曳时折射光线，正是月光透过水晶帘的意象。

整套以发簪形式呈现，搭配一枚胸针，共同还原诗中的静秋夜色——宁静、剔透、如诗如画。

series.series: 花的系列 · 月桂流金
series.series_zh: 桂花系列（花窗胸针·发簪·发冠）
series.title: Osmanthus — Moonlit Gold
series.title_zh: 月桂流金（花窗胸针·发簪·发冠）
series.tagline: Autumn made wearable. Gold osmanthus clusters, deep olive leaves, the palette of October's moon-viewing season.
series.tagline_zh: 可佩戴的秋天。金黄桂花簇，墨绿金边叶，十月赏月的色彩。
series.story:
The Osmanthus series is titled 四时之景·月桂流金 — "Scenes of the Four Seasons: Moonlit Osmanthus in Flowing Gold". It is built around a core philosophy of Chānhuā: to understand nature deeply, then render it with vision rather than imitation.

In nature, osmanthus blossoms are tiny — easily overlooked on the branch. Here they are intentionally enlarged so that the four-petal structure becomes the centrepiece the viewer can truly appreciate. Clusters of gold and amber blooms are arranged alongside deep olive-green leaves shaded with metallic gold — autumn made wearable.

Three design principles: Scale — petals enlarged to make the four-petal form the visual hero. Structure — precise four-petal clusters, evoking the density of a blossoming branch. Colour — rich golden yellow against autumn-bronze green (秋香绿), the palette of October's moon-viewing season.

Three forms: Lattice brooches (花窗胸针) — osmanthus blooms from woven bamboo-lattice bases in heart and arch shapes. Hairpin (发簪) — a U-shaped gold pin with osmanthus, green leaves, freshwater pearls, amber beads, and a white jade disc (the moon behind the flowers). Hair crown (发冠·月桂流金) — a curved gold frame with jade beads, leaf pendants, and a statement osmanthus cluster.
series.story_zh:
桂花系列以「四时之景·月桂流金」命名，围绕缠花创作哲学展开：深入理解自然，再以艺术眼光重新诠释，而非照搬。

自然界的桂花极小，容易被忽视。在这个系列中，花朵被有意放大，让四瓣结构成为可以被清晰欣赏的视觉焦点。金黄色桂花簇与墨绿色金边叶片相搭，是可佩戴的秋天。

三大设计原则：大小（花瓣放大，四瓣造型成主角）、结构（精细花簇，还原枝头繁花的密度）、色彩（金黄搭秋香绿，十月赏月季节的色彩）。

三种形式：花窗胸针（桂花从竹编镂空底座中绽放，心形与椭圆形两款）、发簪（金色U型，配桂花、绿叶、珍珠、琥珀珠与白玉月片）、发冠月桂流金（金色弧形框架，串联白玉珠、翡翠叶挂坠与琥珀珠）。

series.series_zh: 月光下的小百合（发簪·胸针·戒指·耳饰）
series.title: Lily in Moonlight
series.title_zh: 月光下的小百合·月下逢
series.tagline: White silk petals with blue-ombre edges. Yellow amber and white jade. Flowing luminosity — 流光感.
series.tagline_zh: 白色花瓣蓝色渐变边缘。琥珀珠与玉珠。蚕丝在光线下的流光感。
series.story:
This piece is inspired by a couplet from Du Fu's poem:

"If not upon the summit of Jade Mountain,
Then we shall meet beneath the moon at Yaotai."
— 若非群玉山头见，会向瑶台月下逢

The lily is rendered in white silk with delicate blue-ombre edges — petals that fade from pure white at the centre to the cool blue of a night sky at the tips. Each bloom is held open by fine gold copper wire that curves freely outward like tendrils, catching the light as real moonlight would catch on a living stem.

Yellow amber beads (琥珀珠) and white jade beads (玉珠) are scattered along the gold wire — warm against cool, earth against sky — evoking the contrast of candlelight and moonlight in a classical Chinese night scene.

The collection is presented as a full set: hairpin (发簪), brooches (胸针), ring, and earrings.
series.story_zh:
这件作品灵感来自杜甫的诗句：「若非群玉山头见，会向瑶台月下逢。」

白色蚕丝花瓣边缘渐染蓝色，从花心纯白过渡到花尖的夜空蓝，金色铜丝自由延伸如藤蔓，在光线下熠熠生辉。

黄色琥珀珠与白色玉珠点缀其间——暖与冷、土地与天空的对比，重现中国古典夜色中烛光与月光交织的意境。

整个系列以套装形式呈现，包括发簪、胸针、戒指与耳饰。

series.series: 花的系列 · 一一风荷举
series.series_zh: 夏莲系列（发簪·胸针·戒指·耳饰）
series.title: Lotus in the Wind
series.title_zh: 一一风荷举（发簪·胸针·戒指·耳饰）
series.tagline: Pale green and blush-white petals caught mid-breath. Freshwater pearls and jade among summer lotus.
series.tagline_zh: 淡绿与藕白花瓣，凝固于夏风一息。淡水珍珠与翡翠珠点缀于花间，清凉如荷下静水。
series.story:
This collection is inspired by a line from Zhou Bangyan's Song Dynasty ci-poem 《苏幕遮》:

"The water's surface — round and clear — lotus after lotus rising gently in the wind."
— 水面清圆，一一风荷举

Pale green and blush-white silk petals are wound with precision around copper wire frames, their tips curved gently upward as if caught mid-breath — frozen in the moment of rising. Freshwater pearls (淡水珍珠) and delicate jade beads (翡翠珠) nestle among the petals.

The full collection includes hairpin (发簪), brooches (胸针), ring (戒指), and earrings.
series.story_zh:
这件作品灵感来自周邦彦《苏幕遮》中的一句词：「水面清圆，一一风荷举。」

淡绿与藕白蚕丝花瓣缠绕于铜丝骨架，花尖轻轻上翘，如同凝固于风中一息。淡水珍珠与翡翠珠点缀花间，清凉、静谧。

整套系列包括发簪、胸针、戒指与耳饰。

series.title: Kinship — Bonds of Silk
series.title_zh: 亲情系列（定制礼品·亲子款）
series.tagline: Pieces made to carry a relationship — mother and daughter, grandmother and grandchild.
series.tagline_zh: 为一段关系而生的珠宝——母女、祖孙。蚕丝将两颗心连结。
series.story:
The Kinship Series was born from a simple truth: some of the most meaningful jewellery is not made for the wearer alone, but for the bond between two people.

Designs in this series often come in paired sets: matching motifs in different colourways, or complementary pieces that speak to each other across a relationship.

Commission a Kinship piece to mark a birthday, a graduation, a wedding anniversary, a new arrival, or simply the quiet, enduring fact of a bond that needs no occasion.
series.story_zh:
亲情系列源于一个简单的真理：最有意义的珠宝，往往不只是为了佩戴者本身，而是为了两个人之间的情感而存在。

这个系列的设计常以成对套装形式呈现——相同图案、不同配色，或相互呼应的款式。

可纪念生日、毕业、结婚纪念日、新生命，或那份不需要任何理由的绵长情感。

series.title: Bespoke — Your Story in Silk
series.title_zh: 定制系列（你的故事，你的珠宝）
series.tagline: A piece made entirely around you — your flower, your stone, your memory, your story.
series.tagline_zh: 完全围绕你而生的珠宝——你的花，你的石，你的记忆，你的故事。
series.story:
The Bespoke Commission service is where Chānhuā becomes entirely personal.

You choose your flower — orchid, osmanthus, lotus, lily, or something else entirely. You describe your colour memory. You share the story you want this piece to carry. The studio then works with you through a dedicated consultation to design something that exists nowhere else in the world.

Commissions are accepted in six tiers, from $140 for a simple single-flower stud to $2,000+ for a fully multi-piece collection.
series.story_zh:
定制委托，是缠花变得完全属于你的时刻。

你选择你的花，描述你的色彩记忆，分享你希望这件珠宝承载的故事。工作室随后与你展开专属沟通，设计出一件世界上独一无二的作品。

定制委托分六个层级，从$140的简单单花耳钉到$2,000+的完整多件套系列。
